title: Deschampsia andicola
taxonomy: Deschampsia andicola is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Poeae, a group of grasses commonly found in cool and temperate regions. This species is further categorized within the genus Deschampsia, which includes various species of grasses found in the Americas. Deschampsia andicola is native to the Andes mountain range in South America. This classification is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics.
